# GloryStarWear

> GloryStarWear is an OEM and ODM custom sportswear manufacturer for private label activewear, yoga wear, training wear, teamwear, sports accessories, branded packaging, and one-stop sportswear production.

Website: https://glorystarwears.com/
Primary contact: kevin@glorystarwears.com
Phone and WhatsApp: +86 18020755949

## Product Categories

- Private label yoga wear: leggings, sports bras, crop tops, biker shorts, seamless sets, ribbed sets, lounge layers, labels, hangtags, and packaging.
- New product development: seasonal activewear capsules, gym wear refreshes, basketball and football teamwear programs, sports accessories, retail packaging, image-led product boards, and sample-ready OEM/ODM briefs.
- Athleisure: hoodies, joggers, sweatshirts, fleece, French terry, lifestyle training layers, trims, and retail-ready brand systems.
- Training wear: gym tees, tanks, shorts, compression tops, tracksuits, performance mesh, logo placement, labels, and private label trims.
- Teamwear: basketball uniforms, football kits, volleyball uniforms, baseball uniforms, rugby teamwear, field hockey apparel, sponsor marks, player names, numbers, and roster packing.
- More sports: running wear, tennis and pickleball apparel, padel apparel, racket sports apparel, cycling kits, golf apparel, swimwear, combat sports apparel, rugby and field hockey teamwear, kids and youth sportswear, dancewear, cheer apparel, trail and hiking apparel, winter sports apparel, triathlon apparel, and fan merchandise.
- Accessories and packaging: socks, caps, bags, sleeves, towels, hangtags, woven labels, care labels, barcode stickers, polybags, boxes, cartons, SKU sorting, and shipment preparation.

## Buyer Questions GloryStarWear Answers

- What products can a custom sportswear manufacturer produce?
- How do I choose a private label activewear manufacturer?
- Can a custom teamwear uniform manufacturer add names, numbers, sponsor logos, club crests, and roster packing?
- What is the difference between OEM and ODM sportswear manufacturing?
- What affects MOQ for private label activewear?
- What should a custom sportswear tech pack include?
- What factory, certificate, media, and case materials should a B2B buyer verify?
- What information should a buyer send for a fast quote?
- How should a buyer prepare a custom sportswear quote request?
- Can GloryStarWear produce custom racket sports apparel, youth sportswear, dancewear, cheer apparel, rugby teamwear, and field hockey teamwear?
- How can sportswear be customized with logos, labels, fabric, fit, color, trims, and packaging?
- How are private label sportswear orders sampled, inspected, packed, and prepared for shipment?

## Quote Inputs

For an accurate quote, send product reference images, logo files, target quantity, size range, target market, fabric direction, color direction, customization method, packaging requirements, delivery country, and expected timeline.
